title: Terms & Conditions
summary: These Terms & Conditions govern access to and use of DotKE services, including the app, website, support channels, and domain-related workflows.
highlights: Explains the rules for using DotKE services and customer accounts.
Sets expectations for orders, renewals, availability, and service operations.
Describes acceptable use, suspension rights, and key liability boundaries.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
body: By accessing or using DotKE services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions and any policies that are incorporated by reference.
If you do not agree with these terms, you should not use the service.
bullets: These terms apply to web, mobile, support, and domain-management interactions.
Additional service-specific rules may apply to some products or workflows.

sections.title: Accounts and Eligibility
body: You are responsible for providing accurate information when creating or managing an account and for keeping your credentials secure.
You must not impersonate another person, use false identity details, or give access to unauthorized users.
bullets: Keep login credentials confidential and updated.
Promptly review and report unauthorized account activity.

sections.title: Orders and Service Delivery
body: Submitting an order, registration request, transfer request, or renewal request does not guarantee completion until operational and policy requirements have been satisfied.
Availability, registrar processes, payment confirmation, and registry rules may affect whether a requested service can be completed.
bullets: Domain availability can change between search and checkout.
Operational completion may depend on third-party registrars, infrastructure, or policy checks.

sections.title: Fees, Billing, and Renewals
body: Applicable fees must be paid before services are activated or renewed unless another billing arrangement has been agreed in writing.
Failure to renew or maintain payment may result in suspension, expiry, or interruption of associated services.
bullets: Customers should monitor expiry dates and renewal reminders.
Refund handling may depend on service status, provider rules, and applicable law.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
body: You must not use DotKE services for unlawful activity, phishing, fraud, abuse, malware distribution, or other harmful conduct.
We may investigate misuse, preserve evidence where appropriate, and cooperate with lawful requests from regulators or enforcement bodies.
bullets: Do not use the platform to harm networks, systems, or other users.
Abusive or deceptive conduct can lead to immediate restrictions.

sections.title: Suspension and Termination
body: We may suspend, limit, or terminate access where reasonably necessary to protect users, enforce policy, respond to abuse, address security risk, or comply with legal obligations.
Where practical, we may provide notice before taking action, but urgent security or abuse situations may require immediate intervention.
bullets: Protective actions may be temporary or permanent depending on risk and severity.
Operational holds may remain in place until verification or remediation is complete.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
body: The service, interface, branding, documentation, and related materials remain the property of DotKE or its licensors unless stated otherwise.
These terms do not transfer ownership of our intellectual property to users.
bullets: Do not copy, resell, or misuse protected materials without permission.
Customer content remains subject to the rights needed to operate the service.

sections.title: Disclaimers and Liability
body: DotKE services are provided on a commercially reasonable basis, but uninterrupted availability, absolute accuracy, and complete freedom from defects cannot be guaranteed.
To the extent permitted by law, DotKE is not liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or business interruption losses arising from use of the service.
bullets: Customers remain responsible for their own business continuity and backup planning.
Some limitations may not apply where restricted by law.

sections.title: Changes to Services or Terms
body: We may update these terms, service features, workflows, or operational requirements to reflect product changes, legal developments, or security needs.
When changes are material, we may provide notice through the app, website, or other appropriate channels.
bullets: Continued use after updates may mean you accept the revised terms.
Material changes should be released through a controlled review process.

sections.title: General Terms
body: If any part of these terms is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions continue to apply to the fullest extent permitted.
These terms work together with other applicable policies, including privacy and operational documentation.
bullets: A waiver in one situation does not waive rights in another situation.
Operational and policy documents should be read alongside these terms.
